heading: Thursday Night
text: Chance of an evening shower or thunderstorm far south; strong storms with gusty winds possible. Otherwise clouds clearing out, and wildfire smoke decreasing from north to south. Patchy fog late. Lows in the low to mid 50s, some upper 40s in northern cold hollows, and some upper 50s ear Lake Champlain. Northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then decreasing to 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Partly to mostly sunny after any early fog. Highs from the upper 60s to mid 70s north, and upper 70s to mid 80s in the south. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, and gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Fair early, then increasing clouds. Chance of a late-night shower in the St. Lawrence Valley. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s, some lower 50s in the cooler hollows north. Winds becoming south to southeast 5 to 10 mph.
